full_text:
Deng You 鄧由
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng You (鄧由). Attempted to lure Hu Lie into a trap through a false surrender ploy. The plan was thwarted by Wang Ji. Deng You was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
